name: Athlete Gift Basket
recipeInstructions:
1. Assemble all items into the basket.
2. Arrange the high energy bars, sports drinks, and carbo-loaded mix in an accessible area.
3. Place the jar of pasta sauce near the other snacks for easy access during meal preparation.
4. Set the sunscreen, lip balm, moisturizer, and shower soap within reach on a shelf or tray next to the basket.
